questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "expect"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "probably"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "definitely"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "forecast"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "goal"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "prepare"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "upcoming"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "resolution"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "organize"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "deadline"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "reserve"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "postpone"?
Choose the best word: We are preparing for the trip. (_____)
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "We are preparing for the trip." — từ đúng là "prepare" (chuẩn bị).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The _____ holiday is exciting.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The upcoming holiday is exciting." — từ đúng là "upcoming" (sắp tới).

questions.question: Choose the best word: My _____ is to exercise more.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "My resolution is to exercise more." — từ đúng là "resolution" (quyết tâm).

questions.question: Choose the best word: They are organizing a party. (_____)
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "They are organizing a party." — từ đúng là "organize" (tổ chức).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The _____ is next Friday.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The deadline is next Friday." — từ đúng là "deadline" (hạn chót).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I will _____ a table for two.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I will reserve a table for two." — từ đúng là "reserve" (đặt trước).

questions.question: Choose the best word: We had to _____ the trip.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "We had to postpone the trip." — từ đúng là "postpone" (hoãn lại).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Please _____ your booking.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Please confirm your booking." — từ đúng là "confirm" (xác nhận).

questions.question: Choose the best word: We have _____ of time.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "We have plenty of time." — từ đúng là "plenty" (nhiều).

questions.question: Choose the best word: I will see you _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "I will see you soon." — từ đúng là "soon" (sớm).

questions.question: Choose the best word: _____, we will move abroad.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Eventually, we will move abroad." — từ đúng là "eventually" (cuối cùng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Plan _____ for the holidays.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Plan ahead for the holidays." — từ đúng là "ahead" (phía trước).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I think it ___ rain tomorrow.
questions.explanation: Use 'will' for a prediction based on opinion.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Look at those clouds! It ___ rain.
questions.explanation: 'Going to' for predictions based on present evidence.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: I ___ meet my friend at six tonight (arranged).
questions.explanation: Present continuous for fixed future arrangements.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: She ___ visit her aunt next week.
questions.explanation: 'Be going to' + base verb for plans.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Don't worry, I ___ help you.
Complete the sentence: We ___ to the cinema this evening (planned).
questions.explanation: Present continuous for a planned arrangement.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Perhaps they ___ come later.
Complete the sentence: The train ___ at 9 a.m. (timetable).
Complete the sentence: I'm sure she ___ pass the test.
Complete the sentence: What ___ you going to do tonight?
Which English word means "mong đợi"?
Which English word means "có lẽ"?
Which English word means "chắc chắn"?
Which English word means "dự báo"?
Which English word means "mục tiêu"?
Which English word means "chuẩn bị"?
